name: vercel-nextjs
description: Next.js (vercel/next.js) 모노레포 프리셋 — turbopack/cache/server-actions 등 Next 특화 도메인. 2026-04-26 1단계 라벨링(41건) 기반.

rule_templates.ci/cd: Verify GitHub Actions workflow before merging — {count} regressions
rule_templates.test/e2e: Re-run full integration suite for affected workspaces — {count} flaky regressions
rule_templates.docs: Keep docs and code in sync — {count} mismatches
rule_templates.scripts: Repo automation scripts touch CI — dry-run before merge — {count} regressions
rule_templates.monorepo: pnpm-workspace and postinstall changes affect every install — verify clean install in CI — {count} regressions
rule_templates.font: next/font changes affect build cache — verify build artifacts — {count} regressions
rule_templates.server-actions: Server Actions transform changes affect every action handler — re-run RSC integration suite — {count} regressions
rule_templates.edge-runtime: Edge runtime APIs differ from Node — verify both runtime targets — {count} regressions
rule_templates.cache: Cache lifecycle changes can leak data across requests — verify isolation — {count} regressions
rule_templates.build: next build path changes affect every consumer — re-run build matrix — {count} regressions
rule_templates.ts-plugin: TS plugin runs in editor — verify in VSCode after change — {count} regressions
rule_templates.cli: CLI changes affect every developer flow — verify next dev/start/build smoke — {count} regressions
rule_templates.server-runtime: Server runtime changes affect every request — verify dev and prod start paths — {count} regressions
rule_templates.turbopack: Turbopack core changes can affect bundling correctness — re-run integration tests across crates — {count} regressions
rule_templates.maintenance: Re-run full test suite after refactor/dependency bumps — {count} regressions
rule_templates.config: Restart dev server after config changes — {count} regressions

rule_hints.scripts: → Dry-run repo automation scripts before merge
rule_hints.monorepo: → Verify clean install after pnpm-workspace/postinstall changes
rule_hints.font: → Verify build artifacts after next/font changes
rule_hints.edge-runtime: → Verify both Node and Edge runtimes
rule_hints.ts-plugin: → Verify in VSCode editor after change
rule_hints.server-runtime: → Verify dev and prod start paths
